ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - Psychology
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]RimSynapse - Psychology[/h1] [b]📚 [url=https://github.com/RimSynapse/RimSynapse-Psychology/wiki]Official Wiki & Documentation[/url][/b]
[b]Companion Mod for RimSynapse.[/b] Provides complex psychological states, rolling short-term memories, and deep long-term trauma tracking.
[h2]Compatibility Matrix[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Royalty DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Integrates memories of nobility and royal power. [*] [b]Ideology DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Integrates crises of faith and spiritual rebirth memories. [*] [b]Biotech DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Integrates genetic dysphoria and vat-grown trauma. [*] [b]Anomaly DLC:[/b] Compatible & Optional. Integrates void taint and cosmic horror PTSD. [/list]
